title: Specify SCHC compression Rules 5 and 6
description: Rule Set Version 2 assigns compression Rules 5 and 6 but provides no complete field descriptors or vectors, while Rules 0-4 have examples only. Independent implementations cannot derive matching, residue, or decompression behavior. Complete normative definitions and vectors before profile adoption.
close_reason: Added normative field descriptors/use cases for SCHC Rules 5 (link-local OSCORE) and 6 (global OSCORE) to draft and appendix; rpl/schc vectors/tests pass. Full west/cargo/pytest/ruff gates run.
